query_normalized: developing a sustainable solar-powered hydrogen fuel production system energy
rationale: This paper satisfies acceptance criteria (a) and (b) because it investigates the specific physical mechanism (photocatalytic water splitting) and material properties (bandgap, optical absorption) required for solar-powered hydrogen production, even though it focuses on a specific 2D material candidate rather than a full system integration. It provides the foundational material science evidence necessary for the "solar-powered hydrogen" component of the user's research question.
